description_long: This is a compact, modern two-seater sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a smooth, light gray fabric. The sofa features two individual seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be uniform in size and shape. The armrests are straight, boxy, and extend to the same height as the backrest, providing a clean, geometric profile. The sofa stands on four short, metallic legs that are slightly angled outward, giving it a subtle lift off the ground and a contemporary touch. The back of the sofa is plain and unadorned, matching the overall simplicity of the design. The upholstery is solid in color with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, emphasizing a sleek and understated aesthetic.
description: A modern, light gray two-seater sofa with straight armrests, uniform cushions, and short metallic legs. The design is minimalist and the upholstery is smooth and solid-colored.
description_view_0: Front view shows two seat and two back cushions, straight armrests, and the sofa's overall boxy shape.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the straight, boxy armrest and the sofa's compact depth.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a plain, unadorned back and the metallic legs at the corners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the armrest and the sofa's slim profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two individual seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all uniform in size and attached, arranged side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at seat height, fully padded, with no decorative elements or material contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, metallic legs positioned at the corners, slightly angled outward, with a simple, exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two attached, uniform cushions and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
